title: Rails around the World
description: A grind-free Modpack about exploring the world on rails
body:
This modpack aims to provide an experience optimised for multiplayer between friends.

It features:
- beautiful terrain in all three dimensions and a plethora of structures to explore and discover
- a selection of Create Addons to enable magnificent railways all throughout
- some dungeons to fight through together
- an arsenal of firearms for duels or PvE firefights
- a ban of Elytras to encourage traditional exploration and infrastructure

### Roadmap
- simplify recipes to skip Create progression towards trains
- increase ore yield to reduce time spent mining
